svg.text: Institutional-Grade Indian FnO Trading Platform · Clean Architecture · DDD · Event-Driven · Broker-Agnostic
CONTROLLERS ARE THIN · No business logic · Dependency Injection · Pydantic Request/Response Models
JWT middleware · CORS policy · Rate limiting · Input validation at boundary · Structured request/response logging
All routes delegate to Application Services · No direct DB access from controllers
EVENT BUS — Redis Streams (Phase 1) → Apache Kafka (Phase 2+)
order.submitted · order.filled · order.rejected · position.opened · position.closed · risk.limit.breached
At-least-once delivery · Consumer groups · Dead Letter Streams · Backtesting replay support · Event versioning
No ORM models in domain · Entities are pure Python
Repository interfaces defined here, implemented in infra
All business rules enforced via domain exceptions
DEPENDENCY RULE — Dependencies flow INWARD only
Presentation → Application → Domain ← Infrastructure · Domain never imports from Infrastructure · Infrastructure implements Domain interfaces
Phase 1: NSE FnO · Phase 2: Equity Swing · Phase 3: Long-Term Investing · Phase 4+: Multi-Asset (Commodity, Currency, Crypto)
